member.name: T:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController
member.summary: Admin API endpoints: dashboard stats, teacher/student management, quiz oversight, results, audit logs, and platform settings.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetDashboardStats
member.summary: Get admin dashboard statistics (total users, quizzes, attempts, etc.).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetTeachersList
member.summary: Get list of all teachers.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.CreateTeacher(Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.CreateTeacherDto)
member.summary: Create a new teacher account.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.DeleteTeacher(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a teacher by user ID.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.DeleteStudent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a student by user ID.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetStudentsList
member.summary: Get list of all students.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllQuizzes
member.summary: Get all quizzes across all teachers.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.DeleteQuiz(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a quiz by ID (admin override — any quiz).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllResults
member.summary: Get all student results across all quizzes.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetLeaderboard
member.summary: Get the global student leaderboard.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetAuditLogs
member.summary: Get recent audit logs.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.ClearAuditLogs
member.summary: Clear all audit logs.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.DeleteAuditLog(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a single audit log.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.GetSettings
member.summary: Get platform settings.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AdminController.UpdateSettings(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Update platform settings.

member.name: T:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles user authentication: register, login, logout, and profile management. All endpoints return JSON for the React frontend to consume.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Register a new student account.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.LoginDto)
member.summary: Login with email and password. Sets an authentication cookie.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logout the current user and clear the authentication cookie.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUserProfile
member.summary: Get the currently authenticated user's profile info.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateProfile(Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.UpdateProfileDto)
member.summary: Update the current user's profile (name and/or email).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.GetCsrfToken(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Antiforgery.IAntiforgery)
member.summary: Get CSRF token for frontend forms.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.AuthController.UploadAvatar(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Upload a profile picture.

member.name: T:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController
member.summary: Student API endpoints: view available quizzes, take quizzes, view results and performance.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.GetDashboardStats
member.summary: Get student dashboard statistics (total taken, average score).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.GetAvailableQuizzes
member.summary: Get quizzes available for the student to take (excluding already taken).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.StartAttempt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Start a quiz attempt and fetch the questions.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.SaveAnswer(System.Int32,Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.SaveAnswerDto)
member.summary: Auto-save a selected answer during a quiz attempt.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.SubmitAttempt(System.Int32,Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.QuizSubmitDto)
member.summary: Submit a completed quiz attempt.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.GetResults
member.summary: Get the student's quiz results.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.GetPerformance
member.summary: Get the student's performance over time.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.StudentController.GetLeaderboard
member.summary: Get the global student leaderboard.

member.name: T:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController
member.summary: Teacher API endpoints: quiz creation/management, question management, and viewing results/attempts.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetDashboardStats
member.summary: Get dashboard statistics for the teacher (total quizzes, total attempts, etc.).

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetQuizzes
member.summary: Get all quizzes created by this teacher.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.CreateQuiz(Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.CreateQuizDto)
member.summary: Create a new quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.EditQuiz(System.Int32,Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.CreateQuizDto)
member.summary: Edit an existing quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.DeleteQuiz(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.PublishQuiz(System.Int32)
member.summary: Publish a quiz to make it available to students.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.UnpublishQuiz(System.Int32)
member.summary: Unpublish a quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetQuizQuestions(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all questions for a specific quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.AddQuestion(System.Int32,Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.CreateQuestionDto)
member.summary: Add a question to a quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.EditQuestion(System.Int32,Online_Quiz_Platform.DTOs.CreateQuestionDto)
member.summary: Edit an existing question.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.DeleteQuestion(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a question.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetQuizResults(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get student results for a specific quiz.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetAttempts
member.summary: Get all student attempts for this teacher's quizzes.

member.name: M:Online_Quiz_Platform.Controllers.TeacherController.GetAllResults
member.summary: Get all results across all quizzes for this teacher.
